originalText: In the latest fiscal update, the company reported that revenue grew by 12% year-over-year, meeting most analyst expectations. However, the report also suggested that operating margins increased to 45% despite rising labor costs. Furthermore, the CEO's claim that over 500 new patents were filed in Q3 seems inconsistent with public filings which show a slower R&D pace.

claims.claimText: over 500 new patents were filed in Q3

sources.name: SEC Form 10-Q (Q3)
sources.evidence: Revenue increased by 12.3% YoY as reported in filing.

sources.name: Quarterly Report
sources.evidence: Operating margins actually decreased to 28.5% due to labor costs.

verificationResults.summary: The claim contradicts official financial statements.

sources.name: Patent Office Database
sources.evidence: Only 320 patents were filed in Q3.

sources.name: Company Press Release
sources.evidence: CEO mentioned aggressive patent filing, but numbers not specified.
